title: malus elzholzii
intro: Malus elzholzii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the Elzholz crabapple or wild crabapple. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus elzholzii include its potential to support immune function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Malus elzholzii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
